message:
feat(robot): add swarm orchestration snapshot to system state output

Extend the robot snapshot output to include active swarm orchestration
state when swarm mode is enabled. This gives orchestration systems
visibility into the current agent allocation and health.

New types:
- SwarmSnapshot: top-level container with active flag, plan, sessions,
  health summary, and recent events
- SwarmSnapshotPlan: allocation plan metadata including scan directory,
  total agents, and per-project allocations
- SwarmPlanAllocation: project-level breakdown showing tier, open beads,
  and agent counts by type (cc, cod, gmi)
- SwarmSessionInfo: per-session metrics including agent type, pane count,
  healthy count, and rate-limited count
- SwarmHealthSummary: aggregate health across all swarm sessions
- SwarmRecentEvent: placeholder for event tracking

Implementation:
- buildSwarmSnapshot(): collects state from all swarm sessions
- buildSwarmSnapshotPlan(): generates allocation plan from bead scanner
- parseSwarmSessionName(): extracts agent type from session naming convention
- Integrates with existing health.StatusOK and RateLimited checks

Tests:
- TestPrintSnapshot: verify swarm is nil when disabled
- TestPrintSnapshotIncludesSwarmWhenActive: verify swarm presence and
  structure when enabled with active sessions

The snapshot is omitted (nil) when swarm is disabled to avoid bloating
output for non-swarm deployments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
